case_title: RONALD E. TIMBERLAKE VS. JONING B. ADAMS

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT TIMBERLAKE, RONALD E. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ADAMS, JONING B. $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,609.50 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAISM DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-10-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR TO ADVISE THE COURT THE STATUS OF THE CASE, RE: PAYMENTS. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROGRESS REPORT ON TIME PAYMENTS (SEE 01/21/10 ORDER) FILED BY JONING B. ADAMS SET FOR JUN-06-2014 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-05-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. "PAYMENTS OF $20/MONTH TO CONTINUE UNTIL MAY 2033. FINAL PAYMENT OF $29.50 TO BE PAID ON JUNE 1, 2033. IF NO PAYMENT RECEIVED, PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR AND RECEIVE ENTIRE AMOUNT REMAINING", PER PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSON. IF, NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED EVERY YEAR UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL BY JUNE 1, 2033. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Alexander Anolik, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, department 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Appellant, Joning B. Adams, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Ronald E. Timberlake, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Anolik. Ms. Evelyn Jones, previously sworn, testifies for the Appellant, Joning Adams.
9:45am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is marked or retained, and all evidence is returned to parties in open court.
